input.message: Mapping out your Crown Cuts build now — booking engine, walk-in queue, SMS reminders, and commission tracking for your 3 commission barbers. Give me a minute.

phaseResults: Setting up your project: Scaffolded 11 files
Generating your requirements document: Generated PRD: crown-cuts-app_PRD_260310.md (12350 chars). Sent to client for review.
Designing your pages: Generated 2 HTML designs: User App, Admin Dashboard
Setting up your data storage: Generated 11 database files (entities + migration)
Building the backend: Generated 9 backend files (controllers, services, DTOs)
Building the user interface: Generated 10 frontend files (pages, components, hooks)
Wiring frontend to backend APIs: Integration included in frontend build
